propertyManagers.title: Property Managers
propertyManagers.subtitle: Manage your property managers and their permissions
propertyManagers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, or email...
propertyManagers.name: Name
propertyManagers.deleteManagerConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
propertyManagers.tourWelcomeDesc: Here you can manage all your property managers and their access permissions.
propertyManagers.tourAddDesc: Click here to register a new property manager.
propertyManagers.tourSearchDesc: Use the search bar to quickly find a property manager by name, phone, or email.
propertyManagers.tourTableDesc: View all your property managers here. Click on a row to see details.

addManagerModal.title: Add New Property Manager
addManagerModal.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters
addManagerModal.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 2 characters
addManagerModal.phoneNumberInvalid: Phone number must be 9 digits (without country code)
addManagerModal.phoneNumberTooltip: The manager's phone number (used as username for login)
addManagerModal.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
addManagerModal.passwordNoteDesc: A password will be automatically generated using the manager's last name (e.g. Doe123!). Share it with the manager so they can log in.
